calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2026 Set For Trial On Nov-08-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents No. 20, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, And Declaration Of Cristina Garcia
Off Calendar Jun-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS NO. 20

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to compel defendant San Francisco Unified School District's production of documents responsive to plaintiff L.W.'s Request for Production No. 20 is granted. L.W. shows specific facts demonstrating good cause to produce the student file of L.T., whom L.W. alleges engaged in the sexual misconduct that is the subject of this lawsuit. L.W. shows that the file likely contains relevant information about the allegations. The parties are ordered to treat all documents produced pursuant to this order as confidential under the protective order entered on December 16, 2025. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
